rule: A finding blocks iff (triage severity >= High) AND (red_team confirmed_exploitable == true). Blue-team detection coverage is a compensating control: recorded, residual-risk-reducing, never sufficient to unblock a confirmed-exploitable High+.

evaluated.why: High and reachable per SCA, but red-team could not chain it (call site pins HS256). Not a blocker; tracked for upgrade.
availability-only, below High line; not emulated.

blocking_findings.title: Forgeable webhook signature (leaked secret + non-constant-time compare)

why_not_single_tool: Six scanners independently would have blocked on raw 'High' severity from SCA (T-003) — which red-team showed is NOT exploitable as written — and might have under-weighted T-002, where neither the leaked secret nor the timing compare is independently scored High by its own tool. The combined red+blue decision blocks on the two findings that are genuinely High AND proven exploitable, and declines to block on the one that only looked dangerous.
source: implementing-devsecops-security-scanning (Security Gate job + branch protection) with combined red+blue decision logic
